items.title: World Cup: Cristiano Ronaldo roars back to life, with his moments off the ball the most telling

items.summary: Cabo Verde scored its first ever World Cup goal, then came from behind to secure just its second ever point by holding Uruguay to a thrilling 2-2 draw that puts the Tubarões Azuis in with a great chance of qualifying for the knock out stages.

items.title: World Cup quick hits: Lamine Yamal scores for Spain, Iran holds on and a welcome for Vozinha's mum
items.summary: Young Lamine Yamal scored less than 10 minutes into his World Cup debut; Iran and Cabo Verde both held out for famous draws against highly-fancied opponents Belgium and Uruguay respectively; and Cabo Verde's most famous mum arrives to see her son. Here's the quick hits from the World Cup.

items.title: Tinana man found guilty of fatal punch attack outside Maryborough pub
items.summary: A jury has found Declan Jamie Thomas Burton, 23, guilty of a deadly punch attack outside a tavern in Maryborough on November 2023.

items.title: Taylor Adams announces AFL retirement after 15 years with Swans, Giants and Magpies

items.title: Final Alice Springs Beanie Festival brings joy to nearly sellout crowds

items.summary: The fog new parents feel is real, but it seems to be driven less by motherhood rewiring the brain than by exhaustion, overload and the relentless demands of caring for a tiny human.
